title: Volume 1 Chapter 3: Luna of the 'Silver'
content: Chapter 3: Luna of the 'Silver'
"Man... yesterday was the absolute best..."
I went to test out the Demon God's power for a bit, and unexpectedly encountered a tentacle-type demon. It allowed me to witness some truly magnificent despair (kumorase).
I tried mimicking Voldia's speech pattern when I was Omega just in case, to hide my true identity, but... I'm seriously not used to talking like that...
『My way of speaking is cool, is it not! It perfectly exudes the majestic presence of a Demon God!』
"I feel like you just lost all your majesty at once with that line, though."
However, there wasn't supposed to be an enemy like that in the anime... could it be that some kind of change is occurring?

...Well, whatever. Something like that is just a trivial detail. With this Demon God's power, I can save the magical girls when they are about to lose, and enjoy their supreme despair over and over again. Fuffufu... it's the best...! Keep despairing to your hearts' content from now on too, magical girls!
『You seem quite cheerful since the morning, Sōta.』
(Hmm? I guess. You sound like you're having a little fun yourself, don't you?)
『It was my first battle in a long while, after all. I rather enjoyed myself yesterday.』
(Thanks for that, by the way. If you hadn't blocked those tentacles yesterday, I would have been a goner.)
『Indeed. By the way, so this is what you call a school?』
(Yeah, Private Ryūsei Academy. It's a prestigious school with a long history. The magical girls from yesterday attend this school, too.)
As I was walking and chatting about such things, I noticed that the students' gazes were all gathered on a single point.
"Look! It's President Tachibana!"
"She's a peerless beauty, as always..."
A single student who possessed an aura clearly different from the rest.
The Student Council President, Reina Tachibana.

The way she walked elegantly, her beautiful silver hair fluttering, was reminiscent of a lily flower. Strikingly attractive, academically excellent, and possessing outstanding athletic reflexes—she was a picture-perfect superhuman.
As the aloof Student Council President, she was both respected and feared by the student body.

However, her true identity is one of the magical girls who protects the city from demons, Luna of the 'Silver'. Although she acts cool, she is a kind-hearted magical girl who puts her life on the line and fights with all her might for the sake of the citizens.
She was pretty battered yesterday, but I'm just glad she's safe.
『So that is the academy guise of the girl from yesterday...』
(Yeah, she's supposedly one of the most capable presidents in the school's history. On top of that, she's the daughter of a distinguished family, so her future is secured.)
But well, I won't ever interact with her at the academy, and to a mob like me, she remains an existence high above the clouds.
"Seito, let's go eat."
"Heh, sorry about this, Sōta... I'm about to go have lunch with Kurusu-san, the head of the library committee..."
For some reason, Seito was bragging with a smug face that basically said 'You're jealous, right?'. I firmly suppressed the urge to deliver a right straight to his face.
This guy is Seito Hoshizora.
Thinking that a loner mob would ironically stand out too much, I made sure to get at least one friend. He is the sole friend of me, the mob Sōta Hayami.
Lately, however, I've been deeply regretting choosing this guy as my friend.
I mean, even though he's a mob, his character is way too intense.
Oh, right, combined with the fact that this is a world inside an anime, the average attractiveness level here is absurdly high.
Especially the students at this school, which the magical girls attend. Both the boys and girls here could undoubtedly conquer the real world if they existed there.
As no exception to the rule, this guy also has a good face, which pisses me off.
"And? Did you actually get permission from Kurusu-san?"
"Hm? No, why would I need to? There's no reason for her to reject my invitation, is there?"
"No, that's definitely not okay. Get proper permission."
"Heh, I prefer to live freely. I have no need for such things."
This guy, seriously... can't something be done about his personality...?
He's not a bad guy... but watching his words and attitude strangely makes me want to punch him in the face.
Good grief, why is a weirdo with such a strong personality a mob character... He needs to take being a mob seriously, like me.
"Anyway, that's how it is. See ya!"
"Yeah, do your best."
After seeing Seito off half-heartedly, I started walking and made my way to the roof.
In reality, a school that leaves its roof open to students would be an endangered species, but in the anime world, it's totally normal.
This is my recently favored lunch spot. Basically, no one ever comes here, so it's a wonderful place where I can eat my lunch slowly and relax all by myself.
『Sōta, eating alone?』
(Shut up and be quiet. The last person I want to hear that from is you, a hall-of-fame loner who was sealed away for years.)
『I have you now, so there is no problem!』
(...Gross.)
This Demon God really talks a lot...
Yes, eating quietly by myself under the clear blue sky every now and then isn't so bad.
Just as I was about to eat the bento I bought at the convenience store, the roof door—which no one was supposed to use—opened.
"—Oh my? It seems someone was here before me."
A beautifully clear voice echoed through the space.
...No way...
There's no way I would mishear that voice.
When I turned around, a silver-haired beauty, Reina Tachibana... Luna of the 'Silver', was standing there.
"P-President Reina Tachibana..."
I involuntarily did a double-take at the appearance of such an unexpected person.

With freezing eyes that seemed to look down upon everything in this world, beautiful silky silver hair that flowed down to her waist, and the idealized model-like figure of a woman, she was the magical girl Luna of the 'Silver'—Reina Tachibana.
"To think there was someone else who ate here besides me."
"P-Please excuse me! I had no idea this was the Student Council President's dining spot! I'll leave right away!"
Alright, ordinary mob student A who gets terrified after unexpectedly bumping into the aloof Student Council President... perfect.
I almost wanted to boast about the sheer perfection of my mob acting.
I should just use this momentum to leave this place quickly.
"It's fine, you don't have to be so considerate. I happen to be alone today too, so why don't we eat together?"
That's bad. If someone were to see me eating lunch alone with Luna in a place like this, my peaceful mob life would be over.
"Ah~... That's way too intimidating for me—"
"...Are you rejecting my invitation?"
"...Excuse me~"
I quietly gave up and ended up eating lunch with Luna.
"I've never seen you before. What is your name?"
"I'm Sōta Hayami, a second-year. It's completely fine if you forget it immediately."
"I won't forget. I'm quite confident in my memory. So you're a second-year just like me. There's no need to use honorifics."
"G-Got it..."
"Fufu, that is much better."
She smiled alluringly and opened the package she was holding in her hands.
It seems she hasn't realized that I am Omega at all. That's a relief, at least.
"That looks like a delicious bento."
"I am actually quite good at cooking, you know."
"Wait, is it handmade?"
"Yes, I wake up early every morning to make it."
The colorfully coordinated bento was mainly Japanese cuisine, containing things like simmered dishes and tamagoyaki, looking truly appetizing.
Now that I think about it, didn't Luna make bentos for the other magical girls too...?
"You... what is that?"
"Hm? It's a convenience store bento."
"...Do you eat that every day?"
"Yeah, I can't cook, after all."
I can't cook at all.
So, ever since my previous life, my diet has mainly consisted of convenience store bentos, cup ramen, and supermarket deli foods.
That hasn't changed now, and so I eat like this.
"Listen here, with a diet like that, you'll just drain your money and you won't get a properly balanced nutritional intake, you know?"
"Well, maybe, but there's nothing I can do about things I can't do, right?"
"...I suppose so. It is none of my concern what happens to you, anyway."
"Isn't that a bit harsh?"
Alright, with this, I should be reflected in her eyes as a sloppy, inferior student! She probably won't want anything to do with me after this.
"Thanks for the meal."
"Phew, thanks for the meal."
I lay down on a bench to take my post-meal nap.
The sunlight is warm and truly pleasant.
Yep, you really just gotta sleep after a meal...
"*Sigh*... Are you seriously planning to sleep?"
"Yeah, how about you, Reina?"
"I'll pass. I have to prep for the next class. You should return to class five minutes before it starts, too."
"Okaay."
"...By the way, do you eat here every day?"
"Hm? Yeah, basically."
"...Hmm, I see... See you later, Sōta."
"Hm? Yeah."
What was that just now?
